text:
Brent settled at USD 77.08/bbl
#OOTT

Rabobank's oil call is simple: 

The Hormuz risk premium is fading faster than the physical disruption.

Brent falls from ~$79 this year to ~$72 by 2028.

Reasonable near-term. 

Much harder to believe over the long term.

quoted_text: Implied Hormuz flow of 13.1 million barrels again yesterday (5 million Iranian, 8.1 million other). Brings the 7d average up to 8.1 mbpd.
